Mix salt, sugar, and both citrus zests in a mixing bowl and mix until homogenous
In a plastic ziplock bag, place salmon and enough cure mix to cover
Remove air from bag, place into a cooler for ~20mins (depending on size of saku)
Remove from bag and rinse salmon off, pat dry with sport towel
Optional: cut into 35g batons that fit across the width of a half sheet of nori (hosomaki style)
